title: Did the quail happen one time or numerous times?
author: joshualinog
tags: 👨🏻‍🔬🧬🙏🩸🕊️ THE SCIENCE OF PRAYER | PRAY = SACRIFICE
labels: 👨🏻‍🔬🧬🙏🩸🕊️ THE SCIENCE OF PRAYER | PRAY = SACRIFICE
excerpt: Exodus 16:13 HB2 16:13 וַיְהִי בָעֶרֶב וַתַּעַל הַשְּׂלָו וַתְּכַס אֶת־הַמַּחֲנֶה וּבַבֹּקֶר הָיְתָה שִׁכְבַת הַטַּל סָבִיב לַמַּחֲנֶה: YLT And it cometh to pass in the evening, that the quail cometh
body:
Exodus 16:13
HB2 16:13 וַיְהִי בָעֶרֶב וַתַּעַל הַשְּׂלָו וַתְּכַס אֶת־הַמַּחֲנֶה וּבַבֹּקֶר הָיְתָה שִׁכְבַת הַטַּל סָבִיב לַמַּחֲנֶה:
YLT And it cometh to pass in the evening, that the quail cometh up, and covereth the camp, and in the morning there hath been the lying of dew round about the camp,
LEB And so it was, in the evening, the quail came up and covered the camp, and in the morning, a layer of dew was all around the camp.

וַהֲוָה בְּרַמְשָׁא וּסְלִיקוּ פִּיסְיוֹנִין וַחֲפוֹי יַת מַשְׁרִיתָא וּבְצַפְרָא הֲוָת אֲנָחַת טַלָּא מִתְקַדְּשָׁא מִיתַקְנָא הֵי כְּפָתּוּרִין חֲזוֹר חֲזוֹר לְמַשְׁרִיתָא
And it came to pass, that in the evening the pheasants came up and covered the camp; and in the morning there was a fall of holy dew, prepared as a table, round about the camp:

https://www.sefaria.org/Targum_Jonathan_on_Exodus.16.13
content:
Exodus 16:13
HB2 16:13 וַיְהִי בָעֶרֶב וַתַּעַל הַשְּׂלָו וַתְּכַס אֶת־הַמַּחֲנֶה וּבַבֹּקֶר הָיְתָה שִׁכְבַת הַטַּל סָבִיב לַמַּחֲנֶה:
YLT And it cometh to pass in the evening, that the quail cometh up, and covereth the camp, and in the morning there hath been the lying of dew round about the camp,
LEB And so it was, in the evening, the quail came up and covered the camp, and in the morning, a layer of dew was all around the camp.

וַהֲוָה בְּרַמְשָׁא וּסְלִיקוּ פִּיסְיוֹנִין וַחֲפוֹי יַת מַשְׁרִיתָא וּבְצַפְרָא הֲוָת אֲנָחַת טַלָּא מִתְקַדְּשָׁא מִיתַקְנָא הֵי כְּפָתּוּרִין חֲזוֹר חֲזוֹר לְמַשְׁרִיתָא
And it came to pass, that in the evening the pheasants came up and covered the camp; and in the morning there was a fall of holy dew, prepared as a table, round about the camp:
